title: senecio rotundus
intro: Senecio rotundus, also known as round leaf groundsel, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the daisy family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Senecio rotundus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and promote the healing of various ailments, making it a valuable herbal remedy. Senecio rotundus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are commonly used in folk medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
